name: Green Beans with Walnuts and Walnut Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over high heat. Add walnut oil and swirl to coat the pan.
2. Add toasted, chopped walnuts and minced fresh parsley. Stir until well combined.
3. Add the cooked green beans (drained) to the skillet and toss gently until heated through, about 4 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve immediately.
Note: This dish can be prepared up to 6 hours in advance. It may be stored at room temperature until ready to serve.
